description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & publish PyPI packages that triggers on push of tags matching v[0-9]+.** and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have a build job running on a matrix of Python 3.10 and OS environments (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) that checks out the code, sets up Python, installs cibuildwheel, builds wheels, and uploads the artifacts. Additionally, it should have two more jobs, upload_to_test_pypy and upload_to_pypi, that download the artifacts and upload them to test PyPI and PyPI respectively, with the latter job only running on release publication events.
